a.xlink:title: Core audio processor — owns the AudioDeviceManager, routing matrix, plugin host, and IPC server.
Base class for all audio-data visualisation components in the Mema processor editor.
Abstract base for all Mema.Re client control panels.
Main UI shell for the Mema application — composes the processor editor, toolbar, load bars,...
Central monitoring panel of the Mema.Mo application.
Central remote-control panel of the Mema.Re application.
Input-channel control strip — shows level meters and mute buttons for all input channels.
Output-channel control strip — shows level meters and mute buttons for all output channels.
Fader-bank remote control — presents input×output crosspoint sliders and mute buttons.
2-D spatial panning remote control for Mema.Re.
Receives ADM-OSC UDP packets and translates them into panning position and mute updates.
Analyses a stream of audio buffers and broadcasts level and spectrum data to registered listeners.
